reviews.comment:
No me gusto .faltan muchos lugares muy lejo .y pocas cosas para chico no hay mucho por hacer.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like it. There are many places missing, they're very far away, and there's not much for kids to do.

(Translated by Google)
Great place to stop for a while after traveling for hours, the bathrooms are spotless!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeFlyLXZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención tanto en el playón como en el local, variedad de alimentos y buen lugar para pasar a comer algo frío o caliente. Pudimos almorzar a las 15 horas allí, cuando en la ciudad no encontramos nada abierto. Precios razonables. Baños en excelente estado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and inside the restaurant, a variety of food options, and a great place to grab a hot or cold bite. We were able to have lunch there at 3 pm, when we couldn't find anything open in town. Reasonable prices. Restrooms in excellent condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobWVtWS13RRAB
